reservation.hotelQuestion: Do you have a reservation at Hotel Poseidon?

reservationForm.name: Name
reservationForm.selectService: The bar is always included for hotel guests. Select a service
reservationForm.success: Thank you for your request! We will be in touch within the next 48-72 hours. Urgent requests will have priority. Thank you for understanding and see you soon!
reservationForm.disclaimer: Please note that this is only a request and no reservation will be confirmed until a positive response has been received from Il Tridente.
reservationForm.disclaimerPrivacy1: By submitting this, I accept and understand

waitlistForm.infoWaitlist: Sorry you didn’t find openings on your chosen date. Please fill in the form below to sign up to our waitlist, and we will contact you in case of new availabilities. Should you wish to sign up to the waitlist for multiple services or dates, please submit the form separately for each request. Thank you!
waitlistForm.dateWarning: Please note: this calendar must be able to calculate from today up to a maximum of 14 days. The day change occurs at midnight Italian time.
